text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month and the duplicate payment has left my account overdrawn. Please reverse one of the charges as soon as possible.
Hi, I am considering moving from the Starter plan to Pro. Could you explain the difference in price and what extra features I would get?
The invoice I received is missing our company VAT number, so our finance team cannot process it. Could you reissue it with the correct details?
I cancelled my plan two weeks ago and was promised a refund, but nothing has arrived. This is getting frustrating.
Our company card was charged 50,000 dollars instead of the usual 500 this morning. This is a serious error and the money has already left our account.
Could you switch my account from monthly to annual billing? I would like to take advantage of the yearly discount.
My card was declined and the subscription that runs our online store renews today. If it lapses we lose checkout. Please help me update payment urgently.
Just wanted to say the prorated credit when I downgraded was handled really smoothly. Thanks for sorting it out.
I noticed I am being billed in US dollars but I am based in Germany. Is it possible to be invoiced in euros instead?
Your pricing page lists the Team plan at 20 per seat but I was charged 28 per seat. Can you explain the difference?
Could you send me receipts for the last three months? I need them for an expense report.
We are evaluating your product for about 200 users and would like a formal quote and details on enterprise billing terms.
The entire dashboard has been returning a 500 error for the last twenty minutes and none of our team can log in to work. Everything is down.
Heads up: the API has been returning 503s consistently since 09:00 UTC and our production sync is fully halted. Flagging it so your team can investigate.
The CSV export button does not do anything when I click it on Firefox. It works on Chrome though.
Every time I try to upload an image larger than about 2MB the page freezes and I lose my work. This is blocking me from finishing my report.
This is absolutely unacceptable. The word recieve is misspelled on your settings page. How does a company like yours let this happen? Fix it.
Minor thing, but the timestamps in the activity log seem to be an hour off since the clocks changed. Not urgent.
Notifications stopped arriving on the mobile app after the latest update. The web version still works fine. Could you take a look?
Search returns no results for terms I know exist in my documents. It was working fine last week.
Thanks for the quick fix on the login bug yesterday, everything is working perfectly now.
We are seeing data loss: records saved in the last hour sometimes disappear on refresh, and this is affecting live customer data right now.
The mobile layout overlaps the menu on smaller phones, which makes a couple of buttons hard to tap. Wanted to flag it.
The integration with our Slack workspace keeps disconnecting every few hours and we have to reauthorise it. It is becoming a real nuisance.
I cannot log in. I have reset my password three times and still get an invalid credentials error. I have a client demo in an hour and need access.
Could you help me change the email address associated with my account? I have moved to a new work email.
I am not receiving the two-factor authentication code by SMS, so I am completely locked out of my account.
How do I add a teammate to my workspace and give them admin permissions? I just want to make sure I do it correctly.
A former employee still appears to have access to our account. Please remove their login immediately, this is a security concern.
I would like to close my account and have my personal data deleted in line with your privacy policy. Could you advise on the steps?
My profile picture will not update no matter what image I choose. Small issue but a bit annoying.
Can you confirm which email address my account notifications are being sent to? I want to verify it is correct.
I think my account has been compromised. There are login alerts from a country I have never visited. Please lock it down.
Thanks for helping me merge my two accounts last week, everything looks correct now. I appreciate it.
The permissions for my editor role seem too limited. I cannot access the reports section that my manager said I should have.
It would be great if you could add a dark mode to the web app. My team often works late and it would be easier on the eyes.
Any chance of adding the ability to export reports to PDF? Right now we have to screenshot everything.
Please consider supporting recurring tasks. At the moment I recreate the same checklist by hand every week.
We would really value a public API so we can integrate your tool with our internal systems. This is becoming important for us to stay on the platform.
Could you add support for German as an interface language? Several of our staff would find it much easier to use.
Love the product! One suggestion: a calendar view for deadlines would make it absolutely perfect.
It would help a lot if we could assign more than one person to a task. The single-assignee limit is awkward for our workflow.
Can you add bulk editing? Updating 200 records one at a time is going to push us to look at alternatives.
A browser extension to quickly capture notes would be a fantastic addition. Just throwing the idea out there.
Please add two-factor authentication via an authenticator app rather than only SMS. We need it before rolling out company-wide.
Would you ever consider an offline mode? I travel a lot and lose access on flights.
I have been a customer for three years and the service has steadily gone downhill. I am seriously considering taking my business elsewhere.
Your support team took five days to reply to my last message. That is simply not good enough for a paid product.
Every time you push an update something I rely on changes without warning. It is exhausting and I am losing trust in the product.
Wow, fantastic. Another month, another feature you promised that never shipped. Really living up to all the hype, well done.
The new interface is confusing and I cannot find features I used daily. Change for the sake of change, if you ask me.
This is the third time I have had to chase the same issue, and I should not have to repeat myself to a different agent every time.
Frankly the mobile app is a buggy mess and using it every day is a frustrating experience. I expected better.
I am disappointed that the price went up while the free support tier was removed at the same time. It feels like getting less for more.
Honestly I expected more polish from a product at this price point. There are lots of little rough edges everywhere.
Your marketing emails are far too frequent. Three promotional emails in a single day is excessive and annoying.
I waited on hold for forty minutes only to be disconnected. The whole support experience today has been a letdown.
It is frustrating that basic features sit behind the most expensive tier. It feels like nickel-and-diming loyal customers.
Hi there, I am a journalist writing about productivity tools and would love to interview someone from your team. Who should I contact?
We would like to explore a partnership to co-market our complementary product with yours. Who on your team handles business development?
Just wanted to say thank you. Your tool genuinely made our quarter easier and the team loves it.
Is your company hiring? I could not find a careers page and I am interested in roles on your engineering team.
asdkjh asd ?? test test please ignore
help
What are your support hours, and which time zone is your support team based in?
Could you point me to your data processing agreement and let me know where your servers are hosted? Our compliance team needs it.
I just wanted to share that your onboarding emails were genuinely helpful and got my whole team up to speed quickly.
Two things: the app has been crashing on launch since yesterday, and separately I think I was overcharged last month. The crash is the urgent one because I cannot work at all.
The export feature seems to be broken. We might need it for a report later this week, though I am not sure exactly when yet.
Loving the product so far! Quick one: the calendar sync seems to drop events older than a month. Is that expected?
Oh brilliant, another redesign nobody asked for. I am sure breaking my workflow again was exactly what I needed this week.
We are trying to set up single sign-on with our company Okta, but the configuration page keeps rejecting our metadata URL.
